_comment_purpose: Vocab overlay for --mode empirical-first. Merged on top of templates/agents/finance/vocab.json by setup.sh; only fields whose meaning changes under empirical-first appear here. Fields not listed inherit from the base finance vocab.
_comment_theory_generator: Mechanism mode reframes theory-generator as a mechanism writer, not a theorem prover. The body lives at templates/agent_bodies/shared_modes/empirical_first/theory-generator-core.md.
THEORY_GEN_ROLE: finance researcher writing the mechanism section of an empirical paper
THEORY_PARSIMONY_THRESHOLD: two reduced-form equations or more than one core channel
THEORY_WEAKEST_POINT_LIST: vague channel, posited equation inconsistent with the DAG, mechanism does not deliver the documented empirical pattern, or mechanism mismatches the identification design
THEORY_SANITY_EXAMPLE_BAD: predicting a 50-percentage-point treatment effect when the documented relationship is sub-percentage-point
_comment_mechanism_term: Mechanism mode papers refer to the economic story as 'channel' rather than 'mechanism' to distinguish prose-DAG channels from theorem-derived mechanisms. Other agents (referee-mechanism, scorer) keep MECHANISM_TERM for their evaluative vocabulary; this is theory-generator-internal.
_comment_pending: Phase 2 (DONE): assembler dispatch wired via --vocab/--shared-bodies-dir as repeatable args; setup.sh and update.sh thread MODE_BODIES_OVERLAY/MODE_VOCAB_OVERLAY through the three variant assemblers; manifest now records `mode`. Phase 3 (DONE): EMPIRICAL_FIRST/THEORY_FIRST marker resolver in setup.sh; Stage 1 Step 4 (identification-designer at Stage 1 with override prompt for the theory-anchored agent body); Stage 3a step 1 reuses the Stage 1 design; Gate 2 + Stage 2b skipped under empirical-first; core.md stage2b_theory_version doc made mode-conditional. Phase 3 carry-forward to phase 4: (a) add a `stage-1-empirical-first-no-design` dispatch block to templates/agent_bodies/shared/branch-manager.md so the Stage 1 N/A escalation path actually works (currently the body recognises only gate-4 / gate-5-reject / gate-5-reject-regen contexts); (b) clarify the operator-escalate state in stage_1.md Step 4 N/A handling — specify what current_stage / status value signals 'blocked pending operator intervention' so auto-resume does not re-enter the pipeline mid-escalation. Phase 4: referee / self-attacker / referee-mechanism vocab overlays. referee-mechanism is a SHARED agent — phase 4 must extend the shared assemblers in setup.sh (assemble_claude_shared_agents, assemble_codex_shared_agents, assemble_gemini_shared_agents) to thread MODE_VOCAB_OVERLAY (currently they take neither --vocab nor --shared-bodies-dir). Phase 4 also covers the agent description swap in claude_variant_agents.json:81 (currently '{{DOMAIN}} theory models') — needs a vocab-driven description so the metadata header matches the body in mechanism mode. Phase 5: scorer H3 swap. Phase 6: empirics-auditor scope expansion. empirics-auditor lives in extensions/empirical/ — phase 6 must thread MODE_BODIES_OVERLAY/MODE_VOCAB_OVERLAY through scripts/apply_extension_empirical.sh (gap documented in that file's header comment).
